$schema_comment: Evidence authorisation registry consumed by tools/audit/semantic_drift_gate.py.
Maps `evidence_id` tokens (referenced inline from README / docs spans via
'evidence_id: <token>' markers) to the full evidence contract required by
Tier-8 (universal / law) authorisation requires all three of:
addition to the eight _REQUIRED_FIELDS of the evidence contract
(substrate, signal, method, window, controls, fake_alternative, falsifier,
interpretation_boundary). Any entry here is a CANON-grade claim; adding
one is a substantive commit, not a cosmetic fix.
This file is loaded before contracts/claim_status_registry.json per

gamma-universal-v1.substrate: multi — zebrafish (WT calcium imaging), Gray-Scott (reaction-diffusion PDE), kuramoto_market (oscillator coherence), lm_substrate (GPT-4o-mini transcripts), levin_bridge (bioelectric field networks)
gamma-universal-v1.signal: γ scaling exponent from topological complexity vs thermodynamic cost, derived per-substrate (never assigned)
gamma-universal-v1.method: McGuirl 2020 derived density → NN_CV for biological substrates; PDE F-sweep 20 equilibria for Gray-Scott; phase synchronisation scaling for Kuramoto; transcript-density derivation for LM; field-line tensor contraction for Levin bridge
gamma-universal-v1.window: 5 independent substrates, each with walk-forward locked windows; per-substrate ledger entries in evidence/gamma_ledger.json (locked=true)
gamma-universal-v1.controls: null-hierarchy surrogates in evidence/alternative_model_tests.json + evidence/failure_regimes.json; permutation-label fake γ tested per substrate
gamma-universal-v1.fake_alternative: permuted-label fake γ measured p-permutation ≤ 0.005 vs true γ on every substrate; see evidence/final_proof_bundle.json
gamma-universal-v1.falsifier: 5 explicit kill conditions in contracts/failure_regimes.json: CI_width_excess, R2_below_threshold, surrogate_overlap, adapter_drift, cross_substrate_divergence
gamma-universal-v1.interpretation_boundary: Applies to systems with a reducible-complexity-vs-cost bridge (topology/thermodynamics mapping). Does NOT claim applicability to systems lacking either a topological complexity metric or a well-defined cost functional.
